prestazioni: Engine swap to Nissan ZD30DDTi (3.0L inline-4 turbo-diesel) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a 4-inch polished titanium tip, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom diesel tuning maps for 350+ hp and 600+ Nm torque

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch, Cusco Type-RS limited-slip differential, and a Nissan Patrol (Y61) 5-speed manual transmission swap with reinforced synchros for heavy-duty use

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for Atlas F24 chassis), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro, and custom-fabricated front and rear sway bars from Whiteline (24mm front, 22mm rear)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny F24 Atlas-specific overfenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser, all fabricated from carbon-Kevlar hybrid for weight savings
Full respray in Nissan 'Midnight Purple III' (code: M702) with a matte clear coat, paired with custom 3M 1080 wrap accents in 'Gloss Black' for the roof, mirrors, and side skirts

Interior retrofit with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Nissan Atlas-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay with a digital gauge cluster from AEM (X-Series 30-0300)
